extortion.description: DELOPT is a world-class Company in the area of Defence Electronics & Electro-Optics and solutions for Retail market with In-Store Technology.We are ready to upload more than 70 GB of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, corporate licenses, agreements and contracts, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), passports and other employee and customer documents, etc.
